<!--
Flywheel rewrites the title and body of this PR when the PR-flow check runs:
the Summary, Changes, and metadata sections are regenerated from the title
and commit list. The only contributor-authored body content that survives
the rewrite is issue-closing trailers — lines matching:

    Closes  #N
    Fixes   #N
    Resolves #N
    (case-insensitive; colon optional)

If this PR fixes one or more tracked issues, list them below — they're
carried through the develop→main promotion PR so the issues auto-close when
the release merges to `main`. Without a closing keyword, GitHub never auto-
closes the issue (the trailing `(#N)` GitHub appends to squash-merge titles
is *not* a closing reference).

Otherwise delete this section.
-->

Closes #
